subject: Fix the service instance issue and support v21
commit_message:
Fix the service instance issue and support v21

Issue-ID: AAI-3128
Issue-ID: SO-3216
Change-Id: Ibc8ff1dd31f42c3c17dc5491dbf56991c74e2785
Signed-off-by: Harish Venkata Kajur <vk250x@att.com>

From what I can gather, I don't see the service being created in AAI.
I am also increasing the log level to print the transaction log to the console.

I see the logs from 6:03 UTC to 6:36 UTC for the resources pod.
The pnf registrate ran from 6:44 UTC to 6:48 UTC.

@Krzysztof, I thought resources logs will be retained for the whole period when the tests run so that to make it easier to debug the issues.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

is the new onap-helm more sensitive?
 it is a bit strange to see the 5 helm charts failed where the components seem to be deployed, the HC OK and most of the E2E OK
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1
> 
> is the new onap-helm more sensitive?
>  it is a bit strange to see the 5 helm charts failed where the components seem to be deployed, the HC OK and most of the E2E OK

yes, before we weren't seeing failed helm deployment (at helm level) whereas we're seeing them now
it's because configmap to store helm package is too big
